final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 grid poster for 小红书 (Xiaohongshu) publication, designed to be cleanly sliced into 9 individual square posts.

Style/medium: needs a "clean, premium, healing" 小红书爆款 aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk magazine editorial minimalism, 2020s Korean lifestyle Instagram grids, Rifle Paper Co. soft-illustration stationery; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3-column × 3-row grid layout with clear boundaries between all 9 cells, each cell centered and complete, no text crossing cell borders, visible spacing or thin borders between cells for clean slicing
Subject: must include 9 cells with the following content:
  Cell 1 (cover): large title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", with soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask elements
  Cell 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", with phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Cell 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", with bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", with air conditioner, thermometer, blanket
  Cell 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", with coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Cell 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", with bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", with notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", with clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer "收藏这组，今晚试试看", with breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: must be unified across all 9 cells with cream-white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel tones
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: must be cream-white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel dominant, with dark brown text accents
Materials/textures: must include soft light-illustration accents (pillows, moon, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy, books, eye masks, curtains, beds) with gentle skeuomorphic touches
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as specified in Subject field above — all 9 cell titles, body copy, and footer text preserved verbatim
Constraints: must be 3×3 grid with clean slice boundaries, each cell must work as standalone 小红书 post, generous whitespace, large readable Chinese text, no text near cut lines, magazine-quality layout, premium editorial feel, no cheap marketing aesthetic
Avoid: garish colors, cluttered layouts, small unreadable text, text crossing grid lines, English text, chaotic or cheap aesthetic
